title: Torpedo Training
subtitle: Weapons Systems Validation

briefing.situation: Three unarmed cargo vessels are transiting the area at slow speed. No escorts are present.
briefing.mission: Test torpedo systems against live targets. Practice firing solutions, torpedo guidance, and reload procedures.
briefing.execution: Targets are slow and undefended. Use this opportunity to test different attack profiles - passive homing, active homing, and various run depths.
briefing.threats: None. This is an uncontested training environment.
briefing.notes: Weapons free. All torpedo expenditure is authorized for training purposes.

red_mission_summary: RED convoy vessels are transiting. No combat capability.
blue_mission_summary: BLUE submarine will conduct torpedo firing exercises against unarmed targets.
objective: Destroy all convoy vessels using torpedoes.
blue_captain_summary: Torpedo training exercise. Destroy the three convoy targets (convoy-01, convoy-02, convoy-03). Weapons free.

RED.narrative: Three unarmed cargo vessels providing static targets for torpedo practice. No escort, no sensors, no weapons. Their job is to keep moving in straight lines.
RED.primary_objective: Maintain assigned course and speed for the duration of the exercise
RED.intelligence: This is a training range. Trainee submarines will attempt torpedo runs. The convoys are non-evasive practice targets.
constraints: Hold course and speed; this is a training range

ship_behaviors.convoy-01: You are an unarmed cargo vessel. Maintain course and speed. You have no weapons or sensors.
ship_behaviors.convoy-02: You are an unarmed cargo vessel. Maintain course and speed. You have no weapons or sensors.
ship_behaviors.convoy-03: You are an unarmed cargo vessel. Maintain course and speed. You have no weapons or sensors.

triggers.comms: WEAPONS OFFICER: All tubes loaded and ready. Targets bearing north.
